name: job-apply-kanban
description: 求职申请管理看板 — 根目录一键启动前后端

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run env:copy && npm run db:prepare
scripts.db:prepare: npm run db:deploy --prefix backend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend
